---
title: "The “oil vulnerability” of commuter patterns: A case study from Yorkshire and the Humber, UK"
description: "Robin Lovelace and Ian Philips (2014). The “oil vulnerability” of commuter patterns: A case study from Yorkshire and the Humber, UK. *Geoforum*. https://doi.org/http://dx.doi.org/10.1016/j.geoforum.2013.11.005"
date: "2014-01-01"
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
citation-key: "lovelace_oil_2014"
citation-type: "article-journal"
citation-type-label: "Journal Article"
venue: "Geoforum"
doi: "http://dx.doi.org/10.1016/j.geoforum.2013.11.005"
publication-url: "http://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S0016718513002480"
authors:
  - "Robin Lovelace"
  - "Ian Philips"
---

**Type:** Journal Article
**Venue:** Geoforum
**Year:** 2014

[DOI](https://doi.org/http://dx.doi.org/10.1016/j.geoforum.2013.11.005) [Publisher Link](http://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S0016718513002480) [BibTeX](entry.bib)

## Citation

Robin Lovelace and Ian Philips (2014). The “oil vulnerability” of commuter patterns: A case study from Yorkshire and the Humber, UK. *Geoforum*. https://doi.org/http://dx.doi.org/10.1016/j.geoforum.2013.11.005

## BibTeX

```bibtex
@article{lovelace_oil_2014,
  title = {The ‘Oil Vulnerability’ of Commuter Patterns: {{A}} Case Study from {{Yorkshire}} and the {{Humber}}, {{UK}}},
  author = {Lovelace, Robin and Philips, Ian},
  date = {2014-01},
  journaltitle = {Geoforum},
  volume = {51},
  number = {0},
  pages = {169--182},
  issn = {0016-7185},
  doi = {http://dx.doi.org/10.1016/j.geoforum.2013.11.005},
  url = {http://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S0016718513002480},
  keywords = {Oil vulnerability,Peak oil,resilience,vulnerability}
}
```

## Notes

{{< include _notes.qmd >}}
